description_long: This is a large, visually striking Ferris wheel with a prominent circular frame supported by two red A-frame trusses on either side. The wheel features multiple blue and white passenger cabins evenly spaced around its circumference, each with a boxy, enclosed design. The central hub is decorated with a large Pepsi logo and the word 'PEPSI' in bold letters, making it a branded attraction. The base is set on a landscaped platform with grass, a paved entryway, and a staircase leading up to the ride. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with some plastic or composite materials for the cabins and signage. The Ferris wheel is situated in an open area, with no adjacent buildings, suggesting it is located in a park or fairground setting.
description: A large, Pepsi-branded Ferris wheel with blue and white cabins, red A-frame supports, and a landscaped base, set in an open park area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the wheel, the A-frame supports, and the entry staircase at the base.
description_view_1: Full frontal view highlighting the circular wheel, evenly spaced cabins, and the open area beneath the structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the cabins and support structure.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the prominent 'PEPSI' sign and logo at the central hub, with the entry path and stairs leading up to the ride.
attribute_style_of_central_hub: decorative, branded with a large Pepsi logo and bold signage, featuring visible spokes
